instructions.summary: Get a Worktugal Slack webhook URL (or your personal Slack token) so the agent can post the VerdeDesk announcement to #freelancing
instructions.detail: Worktugal Slack is the highest-quality lead source. If you can get an Incoming Webhook URL for the channel, the agent posts autonomously. If not (community Slack, can't install bots), this stays manual.
instructions.exact_action:
Option A — Incoming Webhook (preferred):
1. Ask Worktugal Slack admin to create an Incoming Webhook for #freelancing or #tools
2. They'll give you a URL like: https://hooks.slack.com/services/T.../B.../...
3. Add to ~/.founder-secrets: export WORKTUGAL_SLACK_WEBHOOK="https://hooks.slack.com/..."

Option B — if you can't get a webhook:
Just post the Worktugal message manually (Post 3 in .github/distribution/posts-2026-03-18.md). It's one message.
instructions.unblocks: Autonomous Slack distribution to highest-quality lead pool
